Notes: Matches cloudflare_record.apex in deploy/terraform/oci-citadel-dns.tf - resolves to oci_core_public_ip.citadel.ip_address at apply time - proxied=false (grey cloud - required for Traefik tlsChallenge/TLS-ALPN-01 ACME per infra/traefik/traefik.yml)
Matches cloudflare_record.api in deploy/terraform/oci-citadel-dns.tf - a record in this zone (DNS-001) not a separate delegated api.trancendos.com zone - proxied=false

Matches cloudflare_record.the_workshop in deploy/terraform/oci-citadel-dns.tf - real DNS record but currently non-functional at the HTTP layer - Forgejo's only Traefik router rule is Host(trancendos.com) && PathPrefix(/the-workshop) which does not match a the-workshop.trancendos.com Host header - a request to this bare subdomain will not reach Forgejo until a matching host rule is added - proxied=false
